nasb.text: And I arose in the night, I and a few men with me. I did not tell anyone what my God was putting into my mind to do for Jerusalem and there was no animal with me except the animal on which I was riding.

esv.text: Then I arose in the night, I and a few men with me. And I told no one what my God had put into my heart to do for Jerusalem. There was no animal with me but the one on which I rode.

cnv.text: 我在夜間起來，和幾個人一起出去，我沒有告訴任何人我的　神使我定意要為耶路撒冷作的事，除了我所騎的一頭牲口以外，沒有帶著別的牲口。

ccb.text: 然后在夜间起来，带着几个人出去。上帝感动我要为耶路撒冷做的事，我没有告诉任何人。除了我骑的牲口外，我们没有带其他牲口。
